props.title: Forty-One Million Americans Run a Business Alone. AI Handles Everything Except the Hardest Question.

props.text: Solo founders in 2026 have AI for code, design, content, and support — but no tool for the hardest question: what will other people think? Traditional focus groups cost thousands. Synthetic respondents are too agreeable. MiroShark offers a third option: drop twelve AI agents with real professional backgrounds onto simulated social platforms, let them argue for ten minutes, and get a structured record of how opinions moved — for a dollar.
